scripts.build: bun run gen:catalog && bun run gen:docs && bun run --filter @notshekhar/loop-sandbox build && bun run --filter @notshekhar/loop-core build && bun run --filter @notshekhar/loop-tui build && bun run --filter @notshekhar/loop build
scripts.link: bun run --filter @notshekhar/loop build && cd packages/cli && bun link
